narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन बनाम गाजा में नागरिकों की हत्या, अस्पतालों और स्कूलों पर बमबारी पर अमेरिका और यूरोप के दोहरे मानकों ने इसकी स्थिति को बाकी दुनिया के लिए असुरक्षित बना दिया है।
narratives.reasoning: The quote directly criticizes the US and Europe for their 'double standards' regarding civilian casualties and bombings, portraying Western diplomatic positions as hypocritical and undermining their global standing.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन बनाम गाजा में नागरिकों की हत्या, अस्पतालों और स्कूलों पर बमबारी पर अमेरिका और यूरोप के दोहरे मानकों ने इसकी स्थिति को बाकी दुनिया के लिए असुरक्षित बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly accuses the US and Europe of applying 'double standards' by reacting differently to civilian casualties in Ukraine versus Gaza. It frames Western concern for Ukraine not as principled but as hypocritical and self-serving, implying their stance is based on interests rather than genuine care for Ukrainian fate.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस सब में, भारत की स्थिति ने उसकी कूटनीति को सैद्धांतिक नहीं तो सामरिक जीत दिलाई है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy by presenting India's non-aligned, Russia-engaging position as a 'strategic victory' in contrast to the West's approach. It implies the Western diplomatic stance is less effective or successful, thereby discrediting it, but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.
